description_long: This house features a striking modern architectural design with a multi-level, boxy structure and a flat roof system. The exterior is composed of a mix of dark and light panels, with large glass windows providing ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The house is set on a green, sloped base, suggesting integration with landscaped terrain. Multiple balconies and overhangs create dynamic shadows and add depth to the facade. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass and others more enclosed. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functionality.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels, set on a landscaped green base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main facade with prominent balconies, large glass windows, and a clear view of the multi-level structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sloped terrain, the interplay of dark and light panels, and the staggered arrangement of the building volumes.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals more enclosed sections, additional windows, and the integration of the house with the green base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the entryway, a mix of solid and glass surfaces, and the geometric complexity of the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main door with no porch, steps, or decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines
